title: MANGA ISIK Ikari Shinji Ikusei Keikaku Archive
display_title: MANGA ISIK Ikari Shinji Ikusei Keikaku Archive
wikitext:
[]: [MANGA] [ISIK] Ikari Shinji Ikusei Keikaku Archive             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed May 09, 2007 11:55 pm For anyone who might have missed it, I have an archive of translated as well as raw scans of the Ikari Shinji Ikusei Keikaku manga available on the site. http://www.evamonkey.com/ikari_shinji_ikusei_keikaku/ Anyone who would like to see more of this manga translated should go encourage AT Translations. http://www.att.nagi-fanboi.net/ They managed to translate stage 0 at some point recently. http://www.evamonkey.com/ikari_shinji_ikusei_keikaku/[at_translations]_ikari_shinji_ikusei_keikaku_choco.zip You might also want to contact ADV Manga or Viz and express your interest in a domestic release. I'll notify people via this thread when new stages are aquired and uploaded.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun May 20, 2007 2:31 am I don't know if anyone cares, but they have a poll up on their forums. http://www.att.nagi-fanboi.net/forums/viewtopic.php?t=58 I might recommend registering and voting for Eva if you want them to work on it faster, there appears to be a lack of interest for that one from the people on their forums...

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Sun May 20, 2007 3:37 am Just registered and voted. If everyone here at EMF voted then we'd easily win.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun May 20, 2007 6:51 am But why would I want to register at some site just to vote? Especially one devoted to ecchi. :P

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun May 20, 2007 2:22 pm To get more of the ISRP manga. EDIT++++ I'm now AT-Translations' new editor for this manga!

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Sun May 20, 2007 6:34 pm This is (from what I've seen so far) much more enjoyable than Angelic Days so yea. Please vote or my cat will die. :( Besides, I need stuff to read until volume 11 comes out 5 years later.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon May 21, 2007 12:42 am Registered, voted, blogged on main site. http://www.evamonkey.com/2007/05/at-translations-summer-project-poll.php Go minions, and do my bidding.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon May 21, 2007 1:29 am it is done, my master.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Mon May 21, 2007 2:17 am 4 votes??!! After all EM has done for us, I think we can vote on a simple poll.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon May 21, 2007 6:51 am Patience grasshopper.

[]:             Quote Post by Good_Noodle » Mon May 21, 2007 12:58 pm Thanks for the heads-up! Voted in a heartbeat.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon May 21, 2007 1:06 pm 8 votes for eva!

[]:             Quote Post by Good_Noodle » Mon May 21, 2007 1:24 pm Nine now, it's in the lead! Keep it up and we'll see more harem goodness

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon May 21, 2007 1:24 pm so... what exactly did i vote for? I've never read any eva manga... except retake.. does that count?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon May 21, 2007 9:30 pm I bet you on read RE-TAKE because of what happened to Kaworu in it. And basically, you voted for an AU manga, that is much better than the GOS2 manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Mon May 21, 2007 11:03 pm ReTake...>=( There better not be any praising of ReTake in this topic, or i'll...or i'll...>=(

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon May 21, 2007 11:17 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: ReTake...>=( There better not be any praising of ReTake in this topic, or i'll...or i'll...>=(

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon May 21, 2007 11:17 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: ReTake...>=( There better not be any praising of ReTake in this topic, or i'll...or i'll...>=(

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon May 21, 2007 11:19 pm Just so you know, I'll complain if the typesetting sucks.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Mon May 21, 2007 11:19 pm Yeah, about that...Monkey, what's with the surge of Asuka x Kaworu lately? Just curious.
